segments.text: He's been avoiding that this whole time
segments.original_text: これはグッと前から避けている

segments.text: Reading the outside spacing perfectly and closing in – that's the key!
segments.original_text: 外側をうまく見て差し込んでダブズですね

segments.text: And on this cramped stage too
segments.original_text: 挑戦状というこの狭めのステージも

segments.text: Fox is looking really strong right now
segments.original_text: ちょっとフォックスが有利に運びそうです

full_text: He's been avoiding that this whole time Reading the outside spacing perfectly and closing in – that's the key! And on this cramped stage too Fox is looking really strong right now

corrections.original: 出しこいてダブルアップ
